setup.title: Setup
setup.heading: Initial Setup
setup.welcome: Welcome! Please configure your ticket reservation system.
setup.agreement.title: Data Controller Agreement
setup.agreement.controller_text: You decide what data to collect and are responsible for your own GDPR/data protection compliance
setup.agreement.processor_text: We store your encrypted data but cannot access attendee information without your admin password
setup.agreement.encrypted_text: Attendee names, emails, and payment references are encrypted at rest. Only you can decrypt them by logging in
setup.agreement.responsibilities_text: You are responsible for providing a privacy policy, having lawful basis for collecting data, responding to data subject requests, and compliance with your local data protection laws
setup.agreement.breach_text: We will notify you promptly if we detect a security incident affecting your data
setup.agreement.deletion_text: Your data is deleted when you delete your listings or close your account
setup.agreement.password_warning: If you lose your password you will be permanently unable to view attendee lists. Do not lose your password.
setup.agreement.accept: I understand and accept these terms
setup.country_hint: Sets your timezone, currency, and phone prefix.
setup.complete.title: Setup Complete
setup.complete.heading: Setup Complete!
setup.complete.message: Your ticket reservation system has been configured successfully.
